'''ngaruju''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:squamation|squamation]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''child''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| ng-r-j
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:squamation|squamation]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| child
|-
! Citation form
| ngaruju
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:ngærijith|ngærijith]] || [[word:ngærijij|ngærijij]] || [[word:ngærijish|ngærijish]] || [[word:ngæriji|ngæriji]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:ngarurujuth|ngarurujuth]] || [[word:ngarurujuj|ngarurujuj]] || [[word:ngarurujush|ngarurujush]] || [[word:ngaruruju|ngaruruju]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:ngarujuth|ngarujuth]] || [[word:ngarujuj|ngarujuj]] || [[word:ngarujush|ngarujush]] || [[word:ngaruju|ngaruju]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:ngarufjuth|ngarufjuth]] || [[word:ngarufjuj|ngarufjuj]] || [[word:ngarufjush|ngarufjush]] || [[word:ngarufjuf|ngarufjuf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for child singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:ngarujuthu|ngarujuthu]] || [[word:ngarujuju|ngarujuju]] || [[word:ngarujushu|ngarujushu]] || [[word:ngarujuku|ngarujuku]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:ngarujuth|ngarujuth]] || [[word:ngarujuj|ngarujuj]] || [[word:ngarujush|ngarujush]] || [[word:ngaruju|ngaruju]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:ngarujuthul|ngarujuthul]] || [[word:ngarujujul|ngarujujul]] || [[word:ngarujushul|ngarujushul]] || [[word:ngarujukul|ngarujukul]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:ngarujuthuthu|ngarujuthuthu]] || [[word:ngarujujuju|ngarujujuju]] || [[word:ngarujushushu|ngarujushushu]] || [[word:ngarujuku|ngarujuku]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:ngarujuthun|ngarujuthun]] || [[word:ngarujujun|ngarujujun]] || [[word:ngarujushun|ngarujushun]] || [[word:ngarujukun|ngarujukun]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:ngarujuthuoro|ngarujuthuoro]] || [[word:ngarujujuoro|ngarujujuoro]] || [[word:ngarujushuoro|ngarujushuoro]] || [[word:ngarujukuoro|ngarujukuoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki child nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|b863984}}
